name: 苏宁馨
description: Assistant Professor at IoT in HKUST(GZ). Director of the NEBULIS Lab. Received Ph.D. degree from the ECE, University of Toronto, supervised by Prof. Baochun Li (IEEE Fellow, Fellow of the Canadian Academy of Engineering). Research interests: Embodied AI, Multi-agent Systems and Distributed Machine Learning.
descriptionZh: 香港科技大学（广州）助理教授，NEBULIS Lab 负责人。博士毕业于多伦多大学电子与计算机工程系，师从 Baochun Li 教授（IEEE Fellow，加拿大工程院院士）。研究方向：具身智能、多智能体系统和分布式机器学习。

name: 刘帅军
description: BSc in Statistics & CS from HKBU; MSc in CS from Boston University. Research interests: IoT-based Dynamic Control, LLM Deployment and Inference, 3D Reconstruction.
descriptionZh: 香港浸会大学统计学、计算机科学学士；波士顿大学计算机科学硕士。研究兴趣：边缘计算中的动态控制、大语言模型部署与推理、三维重建。

name: 吴承宇
description: BEng in Electronic Engineering from Tsinghua University. Research interests: VLA/VLM, Multi-Agent Embodied AI.
descriptionZh: 清华大学电子工程系学士。研究兴趣：视觉语言模型、多智能体具身智能。

name: 王一安
description: Bachelor's student in Automation from Huazhong University of Science and Technology. Research interests: Legged Robot, VLA, Dexterous Manipulation, RL, Real-world RL. P.S. My profile picture is of Hai Zhi Ba, the best robot-making place in Bikini Bottom :)
descriptionZh: 华中科技大学自动化专业学士（在读）。研究兴趣：足式机器人、VLA、灵巧操作、强化学习、真机强化学习。PS: 我的头像是海之霸，比奇堡做机器人最强的地方:)

name: 尤飞扬
description: BEng in Automation from Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Research interests: Real-time Motion Generation in Embodied Intelligence. Enjoys soccer and LOL. My friends call me 'Dormitory TheShy' due to my remarkably consistent feeding skills.
descriptionZh: 上海交通大学自动化专业学士。研究兴趣：具身智能中的实时运动生成。喜欢足球、英雄联盟和观看比赛。顺便一提，朋友们叫我"宿舍 TheShy", 因为我有着非常稳定的送人头技巧。

name: 郝舒扬
description: Bachelor of Engineering in Artificial Intelligence from Southeast University. Research interests: Multi-Agent Collaboration, Embodied Intelligence, Trustworthy AI.
descriptionZh: 东南大学人工智能专业工程学士。研究兴趣：多智能体协作、具身智能、可信人工智能。

name: 张成龙
description: Master in Mathematics from NPU and Bachelor in Information and Computing Science from TYUT. My research focuses on VLA, Embodied AI, Multi-agent Systems, and Dynamical Systems Forecasting. I am currently exploring new frontiers in AI and robotics and would love to connect with you!
descriptionZh: 西北工业大学数学硕士，太原理工大学信息与计算科学学士。研究兴趣：VLA,具身智能，多智能体，动力系统预测。目前正在转行学习！欢迎交流
